notes: Minimal witness dataset manually constructed for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Spark validation
PostgreSQL source.sql returned 1.5 on the witness dataset
MySQL rewrite_pos_01.sql returned 1.5 on the witness dataset
MySQL rewrite_neg_01.sql returned 1 on the witness dataset
Spark rewrite_pos_02_spark.sql returned 1.5 on the witness dataset
Spark rewrite_neg_02_spark.sql returned 1.0 on the witness dataset
The negative rewrites use inclusive end-of-year range bounds and drop late-day records such as 2010-12-31 23:59:59
